series_metadata.series_description: Includes design development, programmatic documentation, architect/mechanical drawings, architect agreements, contracts, change orders, construction reports (ie.. meeting minutes, sign in sheets, drawing review comments, project manuals, equipment lists, contractor cost proposals, project budget, capital budget data, project correspondence, vendor compliance, bid documents and fiscal documents.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 2 years after building or facility is destroyed, sold, or otherwise vacated, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 2 years after building or facility is destroyed, sold, or otherwise vacated, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
